TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tao_Ching_Ying, title = Tao_Ching_Ying, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tao_Ching_Ying} }

S.FORM: === u siwkay niza === Tao Ching Ying (1969.10.29) tatayna, nalecuhan i Taywan Taypak. u malimula' a ngangan sa ci Taoce. pahezekan i Taypak Cungsan Tatayna Teban a cacudadan. pahezekan i Kanatal Cengce Tabakiay a cacudadan, Sinbung a Si. u singanganay a tilibi palaw-ngatu telungay. matieng mudadiw, matineng misulit ku cudad, matineng misanga' ku palaw-ngatu. 1990 a mihcan, sakacacay a dadiw-balud mutahkal. ayzasa, u sakapahay a telungay ciniza. mitelung ku laziw a palaw-ngatu ciniza, kayadah a lawad. i Taywan a palaw-saliyut sa, u takalaway mitesekay a misakakawaway. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Matilda Tao Ching-ying (Chinese: ťô∂śô∂ŤéĻ; pinyin: T√°o Jńęngy√≠ng) is a Taiwanese singer, television host and author. Tao graduated from National Chengchi University. In 2005, she married Taiwanese actor Lee Lee-zen. maala kawlah a nazipa'an u insac niza namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ťô∂śô∂ÁĎ©-
S.PHON: === u siwkaj niza === tao ¶ńßiŇč jiŇč (****.**.**) tatajna, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tajwan tajpak. u mar~…ĺimur~…ĺa Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan sa ¶i tao ¶…ô. pańß…ôz…ôkan i tajpak ¶uŇčsan tatajna t…ôban a ¶a ¶udadan. pańß…ôz…ôkan i kanatar~…ĺ ¶…ôŇč ¶…ô tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan, sinbuŇč a si. u siŇčaŇčanaj a tir~…ĺibi par~…ĺaw-Ňčatu t…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj. mati…ôŇč mudadiw, matin…ôŇč misur~…ĺit ku ¶udad, matin…ôŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° ku par~…ĺaw-Ňčatu. **** a mińß ¶an, saka ¶a ¶aj a dadiw-bar~…ĺud mutańßkar~…ĺ. ajzasa, u sakapańßaj a t…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj ¶iniza. mit…ôr~…ĺuŇč ku r~…ĺaziw a par~…ĺaw-Ňčatu ¶iniza, kajadańß a r~…ĺawad. i tajwan a par~…ĺaw-sar~…ĺijut sa, u takar~…ĺawaj mit…ôs…ôkaj a misakakawawaj. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam matir~…ĺda tao ¶ńßiŇč-jiŇč ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: t*o **Ňčj*Ňč) is a taiwan…ôs…ô siŇč…ôr, t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision ńßost and autńßor. tao graduat…ôd from nationar~…ĺ ¶ńß…ôŇč ¶ńßi uni*…ôrsitj. in ****, sńß…ô marri…ôd taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tor r~…ĺ…ô…ô r~…ĺ…ô…ô-z…ôn. maar~…ĺa kawr~…ĺańß a nazipa Ē~ °an u insa ¶ niza namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan ***-
S.FORM: === u siwkay niza === Tao Ching Ying (1969.10.29) tatayna, nalecuhan i Taywan Taypak. u malimula' a ngangan sa ci Taoce. pahezekan i Taypak Cungsan Tatayna Teban a cacudadan. pahezekan i Kanatal Cengce Tabakiay a cacudadan, Sinbung a Si. u singanganay a tilibi palaw-ngatu telungay. matieng mudadiw, matineng misulit ku cudad, matineng misanga' ku palaw-ngatu. 1990 a mihcan, sakacacay a dadiw-balud mutahkal. ayzasa, u sakapahay a telungay ciniza. mitelung ku laziw a palaw-ngatu ciniza, kayadah a lawad. i Taywan a palaw-saliyut sa, u takalaway mitesekay a misakakawaway. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Matilda Tao Ching-ying (Chinese: ťô∂śô∂ŤéĻ; pinyin: T√°o Jńęngy√≠ng) is a Taiwanese singer, television host and author. Tao graduated from National Chengchi University. In 2005, she married Taiwanese actor Lee Lee-zen. maala kawlah a nazipa'an u insac niza namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ťô∂śô∂ÁĎ©-
S.PHON: === u siwkaj niza === tao ¶ńßiŇč jiŇč (****.**.**) tatajna, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tajwan tajpak. u mar~…ĺimur~…ĺa Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan sa ¶i tao ¶…ô. pańß…ôz…ôkan i tajpak ¶uŇčsan tatajna t…ôban a ¶a ¶udadan. pańß…ôz…ôkan i kanatar~…ĺ ¶…ôŇč ¶…ô tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan, sinbuŇč a si. u siŇčaŇčanaj a tir~…ĺibi par~…ĺaw-Ňčatu t…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj. mati…ôŇč mudadiw, matin…ôŇč misur~…ĺit ku ¶udad, matin…ôŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° ku par~…ĺaw-Ňčatu. **** a mińß ¶an, saka ¶a ¶aj a dadiw-bar~…ĺud mutańßkar~…ĺ. ajzasa, u sakapańßaj a t…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj ¶iniza. mit…ôr~…ĺuŇč ku r~…ĺaziw a par~…ĺaw-Ňčatu ¶iniza, kajadańß a r~…ĺawad. i tajwan a par~…ĺaw-sar~…ĺijut sa, u takar~…ĺawaj mit…ôs…ôkaj a misakakawawaj. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam matir~…ĺda tao ¶ńßiŇč-jiŇč ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: t*o **Ňčj*Ňč) is a taiwan…ôs…ô siŇč…ôr, t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision ńßost and autńßor. tao graduat…ôd from nationar~…ĺ ¶ńß…ôŇč ¶ńßi uni*…ôrsitj. in ****, sńß…ô marri…ôd taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tor r~…ĺ…ô…ô r~…ĺ…ô…ô-z…ôn. maar~…ĺa kawr~…ĺańß a nazipa Ē~ °an u insa ¶ niza namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan ***-
